summary.en: Nasdaq futures up 0.4% premarket as AI optimism continues. 10Y yields stable at 4.32%. Oil dips slightly on OPEC+ production talks. Key risk: upcoming CPI data Wed.
summary.zh: 纳指期货盘前涨0.4%，AI乐观情绪延续。10年期美债收益率稳定在4.32%。油价因OPEC+谈判小幅回落。关键风险：周三CPI数据。

title.en: NVIDIA's new Blackwell GPU shipments delayed to Q3, but demand remains strong
title.zh: 英伟达Blackwell GPU交付推迟至Q3，但需求仍强劲

impact.en: Temporary supply constraint on next-gen AI chips; near-term revenue may shift but long-term trend intact.
impact.zh: 下一代AI芯片短期供应受限；近端收入可能延后，但长期趋势不变。

macroRisk.zh: 否 - 公司特定供应链问题

title.en: Fed's Barkin signals patience on rates, data-dependent stance
title.zh: 美联储Barkin暗示对降息持耐心态度，将根据数据决定

impact.en: Reinforces market view that first cut may come in June if inflation cooperates.
impact.zh: 强化市场观点：若通胀配合，首次降息可能在6月。

macroRisk.en: Yes - rate expectations drive asset prices
macroRisk.zh: 是 - 利率预期影响资产价格

title.en: Tesla registers Model 2 in Europe; $25K EV enters final approval stage
title.zh: 特斯拉Model 2在欧洲注册，2.5万美元电动车进入最终审批阶段

impact.en: Expands Telsa's addressable market significantly; pressure on legacy automakers.
impact.zh: 大幅扩大特斯拉可触达市场；对传统车企构成压力。

macroRisk.zh: 否 - 板块内竞争格局变化

ai.en: AI sector remains hot; enterprise spending on GPUs continues. Microsoft's Azure AI capacity sold out quarters ahead.
ai.zh: AI板块持续火热；企业GPU支出不减。微软Azure AI产能已被预订至数月后。

semiconductor.en: Mixed: NVDA delay offsets strong custom ASIC demand from cloud giants. SMIC guidancebeat on Chinese AI build-out.
semiconductor.zh: 分化：NVDA延迟被云巨头定制ASIC需求抵消。中芯国际因中国AI建设给出乐观指引。

bigTech.en: Apple announced new AI features for iOS 19 at private developer event; Google Cloud wins $3B multi-year deal with Meta.
bigTech.zh: 苹果在私密开发者大会上宣布iOS 19新AI功能；谷歌云获Meta价值30亿美元多年协议。

energy.en: Oil dip creates buying interest in E&P stocks; OPEC+ expected to extend production cuts.
energy.zh: 油价下跌引发油气公司买入兴趣；OPEC+预计延长减产。

ev.en: TSLA Model 2 approval progress offsets slower April deliveries in China due to holiday. NIO delivered 12,800 EVs in March, up 15% MoM.
ev.zh: TSLA Model 2审批进展抵消中国假期影响；蔚来3月交付12,800辆电动车，环比增15%。

market.en: S&P 500 futures slightly positive; Nasdaq outperformance continues; breadth moderate with tech leading.
market.zh: 标普期货微涨；纳指继续跑赢；市场宽度中等，科技股领涨。

preciousMetals.en: Gold steady at $2,245/oz; no major flows; inflation hedge demand muted with rates on hold.
preciousMetals.zh: 黄金稳定在2245美元/盎司；无大资金流动；利率持稳削弱对冲需求。

oil.en: WTI down 0.8% to $84.20 as OPEC+ talks continue; shale output rising slowly; demand outlook steady.
oil.zh: WTI跌0.8%至84.20美元，OPEC+谈判中；页岩油产量缓慢上升；需求预期稳定。

futures.en: S&P +0.15%, Nasdaq +0.38%, Dow flat. Tech leading; semiconductor recovers from yesterday's NVDA dip.
futures.zh: 标普+0.15%，纳指+0.38%，道指平盘。科技领涨；半导体从昨日NVDA下跌中修复。

treasury10Y.zh: 10年期收益率4.32%（与上周五持平）；收益率曲线稳定。

dxy.en: DXY 104.15, slight weakness; no major central bank moves overnight.
dxy.zh: 美元指数104.15，小幅走弱；主要央行盘前无行动。

oil.en: WTI $84.20, Brent $88.15; both down ~0.8% on supply outlook.
oil.zh: WTI 84.20美元，布伦特88.15美元；均因供应预期下跌约0.8%。

keyRisk.en: Wednesday's CPI report (consensus: core MoM 0.3%, YoY 2.8%) - print above 0.4% could trigger risk-off.
keyRisk.zh: 周三CPI报告（预期核心月率0.3%，年率2.8%）：若实际高于0.4%可能引发风险规避。

note.en: Futures positive and tech leading, but confidence medium due to CPI uncertainty and NVDA supply delay as a cautionary signal for AI semi strength.
note.zh: 期货上涨、科技领涨，但置信度中等，因CPI不确定性和NVDA供应延迟对AI半导体的警示信号。
